title: Apinagia hulkiana
taxonomy: Apinagia hulkiana is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the family Podostemaceae. This family is commonly known as the "riverweed" family due to its aquatic habit. The genus Apinagia is a group of plants that are found in tropical and subtropical regions of the Americas. Apinagia hulkiana is a rare species, and its classification is still being studied by botanists. Further research is needed to fully understand the classification of Apinagia hulkiana within the plant kingdom.
